## fastText: In Production, but Archived {.r-fit-text}

- **fastText**: The *go-to* for text classification at Insee.
- Reliable and high-performing; deployed in 2021 for APE codification...
- ...but the repository has been [**archived**]{.orange} since March 19, 2024.

## The Stakes

::: {.incremental}
- Lack of library maintenance: eventual risks regarding stability and compatibility.
- Most importantly: it [**stalls modernization**]{.orange}.
- Meanwhile, a highly dynamic **Deep Learning/NLP** ecosystem: [**PyTorch**]{.orange}, **Hugging Face**, etc.
:::

## 2025: Transitioning to PyTorch! {.scrollable}

::: {.incremental}
- PyTorch model closely mirrors the fastText architecture: a smooth transition.
- Discussed [here](https://inseefrlab.github.io/codif-ape-prez/slides/grp-veille-codif-auto-10/#/title-slide):
    - PyTorch allows for *customized* architectures tailored to our needs (handling categorical variables).
    - Improved **training monitoring**.
    - Opportunities for modernization: explainability, calibration, [**higher-performance models**]{.orange}...
- A dedicated package to decouple model definition from its implementation.
:::

## From *torchFastText* to *torchTextClassifiers* {.scrollable}

- Evolution from a single package into a [**toolkit**]{.orange} (a unified framework) for text classification with categorical variables.
    - Inspired by other PyTorch toolkits: [Pythae](https://github.com/clementchadebec/benchmark_VAE) for VAEs, [TorchSeg](https://github.com/yu-changqian/TorchSeg) for segmentation...
- Conceptualization of the various components within a text classification model.
- Seamless integration with the **Hugging Face** ecosystem.

## Library scope and positioning

![From a production standpoint](../img/TTC_positioning_matrix.png){width=300px fig-align="center"}

- If you want to know more, get [here](https://github.com/InseeFrLab/torchTextClassifiers/tree/main) and star this repo :star2:

## Architecture

<div style="height: 100px;"></div>

![](../img/TTC_overview.png){width=1000px fig-align="center"}

## Features

- Explainability :mag: :robot: :bar_chart:
- Multi-label support :label:
- Modular design 🧩⚙️

## Get started

1. check out the [example notebook](https://github.com/InseeFrLab/torchTextClassifiers/blob/main/notebooks/example.ipynb) :books: :rocket:
2. import your own data in **Load and preprocess data**
3. Choose your section based on your goal
    - **torchTextClassifiers: a wrapper to handle them all** :relaxed: ➡️ Fast implementation: just grab-and-go :shopping:
    - **Let's dive into the different components** :nerd_face: (experts)  ➡️ More control: modular customization :wrench: :ok_hand: :sunglasses:

::: {.callout-tip icon=true}

### Some tips for data import
Just update the import section and match your column names.<br>
Works out-of-the-box with [Parquet]{.orange} or [CSV](https://pandas.pydata.org/docs/reference/api/pandas.read_csv.html) for instance (Can ask our [AI chat](https://llm.lab.sspcloud.fr/))
:::
